# Yogyakarta Temple Tours

> Yogyakarta temple tours, Borobudur sunrise, Prambanan, and Merapi adventures by Rama Kusuma.

## Key Guides
- [Borobudur Temple Guide](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/borobudur): Honest guide to Indonesia's greatest temple
- [Borobudur Sunrise Guide](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/borobudur/sunrise): Setumbu Hill vs temple terraces
- [Best Borobudur Sunrise Tours Compared](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/best-borobudur-sunrise-tours-compared): Which tour to book
- [Borobudur Climb-Up Access](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/borobudur-climb-up-tours-guaranteed-access): Which tours guarantee top terraces
- [Prambanan Temple Guide](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/prambanan): Java's Hindu masterpiece
- [Prambanan Ramayana Ballet](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/prambanan/ramayana-ballet): Evening performance guide
- [Borobudur vs Prambanan](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/borobudur-vs-prambanan): Which temple to visit
- [Merapi Volcano Guide](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/merapi): Indonesia's most active volcano
- [Merapi: Jeep vs Hiking](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/jeep-vs-hiking): Which Merapi experience suits you
- [Merapi Safety Guide](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/merapi/safety): Alert levels and what to know
- [Multi-Day Volcano Trips](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/multi-day): Beyond Yogyakarta
- [Yogyakarta 3-Day Itinerary](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/yogyakarta-3-day-itinerary): Perfect temple-focused trip
- [Yogyakarta Food Tours](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/food-tours): Best culinary experiences
- [Yogyakarta Cycling Tours](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/cycling): Temple-to-temple by bicycle

## Planning
- [Best Time to Visit](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/best-time-to-visit): Month-by-month guide
- [Getting Around Yogyakarta](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/getting-around): Transport guide
- [Trip Planning Guide](https://www.yogyakarta-temple-tours.com/planning): Complete Yogyakarta planner
